name: wan-huiyan-cutify-that-tab
description: Cute, hand-authored SVG favicons for web apps — three techniques and 16 ready-to-edit mascots in a single skill.

plugins.name: cutify-that-tab
plugins.description: Add a cute SVG favicon: emoji, gradient blob, or 16×16 pixel-art mascot (bunny, bear, ghost, chick, ...).
